name: 17p13_3_LIS1_PAFAH1B1_SD
description: 17p13.3 SD blocks flanking PAFAH1B1 (LIS1) and YWHAE. Direct-orientation duplicons mediate the Miller-Dieker syndrome contiguous deletion and recurrent 17p13.3 microduplications.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SD modules of 30-100 kb at ~97% identity; PAFAH1B1 (LIS1) sits between two SD blocks; YWHAE proximal; CRK and HIC1 also in interval.
